name: Swedish Rye Bread-Lowfat
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients.
2. Knead the dough until it is no longer sticky.
3. Let the dough rise until it has doubled in size.
4. Punch down the dough.
5. Shape into loaves.
6. Let the dough rise again until it has doubled in size.
7. Bake at 375°F for 35 minutes.
8. Enjoy.
